items.title: Tennis Giants Tumble
items.summary: All the big names are out at the French Open. The result is a very confusing, and very exciting, tournament.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Court can't stop Trump ballroom construction, government lawyer tells judge
items.summary: Attorney Yaakov Roth, speaking during an exchange with U.S. Appeals Court Judge Patricia Millett, said only Congress could halt the $400 million project.

items.title: California governor’s race: DoJ sends in federal observer over slow count
items.summary: Experts warn ballot-counting could drag on in primaries for governor, LA mayor and Congress, as Trump claims ‘rigging’ The justice department on Friday sent a federal prosecutor...
